mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banners (type, image_url, link_url, alt_text, display_order, is_visible) VALUES (#{type}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{altText}, #{displayOrder}, #{visible})
mapper.select: SELECT banners_id , type , image_url , link_url , alt_text , display_order , is_visible , created_at , updated_at FROM banners ORDER BY type, display_order
SELECT banners_id , type , image_url , link_url , alt_text , display_order , is_visible , created_at , updated_at FROM banners WHERE banners_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM banners WHERE type = #{type} AND is_visible = true
